creator: marc@blackend.org
text:
If you talk about this screenshot
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/install/ed0-conf.png,
it's what your get if you install a FreeBSD 8.1-RELEASE which is the
subject of the Handbook (not -CURRENT or any other -STABLE since persons
using images of these versions should know enough about FreeBSD do deal
with what is written that chapter).  So I think we should close this PR
(if it's about this screenshot).

-- 
Marc
